image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about ubiquitin proteasome than social media does.
Context visual: This tiny protein is a master regulator in our cells.
Escalation visual: It tags unwanted proteins for destruction, ensuring balance and health.
Evidence visual: Disruption in this system can lead to diseases like cancer and neurodegeneration.
Payoff visual: So, next time you hear about proteins, remember the unseen hero: ubiquitin.
Cta visual: Curious about more science secrets? Hit that follow button!
